# Shippo plugin for OpenAI Codex

Codex distribution of Shippo's shipping tools. This plugin bundles two things:

- **Skills** (`skills/`): the [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io) `SKILL.md`
  workflow knowledge (rate shopping, label purchase, tracking, address validation,
  batch shipping, shipping analysis, best-practices, SDK upgrades). A 1:1 mirror of
  the canonical `skills/` tree at the repo root.
- **MCP server** (`.mcp.json`): the remote Shippo MCP over Streamable HTTP, with
  per-user Shippo OAuth.

**Do not edit files under `skills/` here.** They are auto-generated by
`scripts/sync.js` and carry a "DO NOT EDIT" banner. Edit the canonical
`skills/<name>/SKILL.md` at the repo root and run `npm test` to propagate. The
`plugin.json` and `.mcp.json` are hand-authored.

## Install

```bash
# 1. Add this repo as a Codex plugin marketplace
codex plugin marketplace add goshippo/ai

# 2. Install the "shippo" plugin (interactive picker)
codex /plugins

# 3. Authorize the remote MCP over OAuth (per-user Shippo login)
codex mcp login shippo
```

Step 3 opens the browser OAuth flow against the Shippo MCP server. Codex forwards
your per-user Shippo bearer automatically on every call. There is no API key to
copy and no static token in the plugin.

> Install is from this repo as the Codex plugin marketplace source
> (`codex plugin marketplace add goshippo/ai`), the supported, documented path for
> a git-hosted marketplace. A future OpenAI-curated directory listing would be
> additive.

## MCP endpoint

`.mcp.json` points at the production Shippo MCP (`https://mcp.shippo.com`,
Streamable HTTP, per-user OAuth via `codex mcp login shippo`; no static token
ships in the plugin). To override
the server `url`, add a `[mcp_servers.shippo]` block to your `~/.codex/config.toml`
(that config.toml table uses snake_case `[mcp_servers.<name>]`; the bundled
`.mcp.json` uses the plugin direct server-map form).
